pl-goals.title: Premier League Goals (all-time)
pl-goals.hint: The record-breakers bust the board — Shearer (260), Kane (213), Rooney (208) are all over 180. Descend with mid-tier scorers and finish on a low one.

pl-apps.title: Premier League Appearances (all-time)
pl-apps.hint: The iron men bust — Milner (658), Barry (653), Giggs (632). Name shorter-career players to control the countdown.

pl-apps-minus-goals.title: Appearances − Goals · Premier League
pl-apps-minus-goals.hint: Long-serving defenders and keepers rack up huge values (Milner 602) — attackers keep it low for the checkout.

manutd-pl-goals.title: Manchester United — PL Goals
manutd-pl-goals.hint: Rooney (183) busts; Giggs (108) and Scholes (107) drop you fast — Hughes (35), Mata (34) to finish.

arsenal-pl-goals.title: Arsenal — PL Goals
arsenal-pl-goals.hint: Henry (175) is the big drop — Wright (104), van Persie (96), then Ramsey (40) or Fàbregas (35).

liverpool-pl-goals.title: Liverpool — PL Goals
liverpool-pl-goals.hint: Salah (191) busts; Fowler (128) and Gerrard (121) descend — Rush (45), McManaman (41) to close.

chelsea-pl-goals.title: Chelsea — PL Goals
chelsea-pl-goals.hint: Lampard (147) and Drogba (104) drop you fast — Terry (41), Anelka (38) for the finish.

mancity-pl-goals.title: Manchester City — PL Goals
mancity-pl-goals.hint: Agüero (184) busts; Haaland (112) and Sterling (91) descend — Gündoğan (45), Mahrez (43) to close.

french-pl-goals.title: French players — PL Goals
french-pl-goals.hint: Henry (175) and Anelka (125) descend fast — Nasri (36), Malouda (35) to finish.

spanish-pl-apps.title: Spanish players — PL Appearances
spanish-pl-apps.hint: De Gea (415) and Fàbregas (350) bust — Morientes (41), Saltor (39) keep you in checkout range.

irish-pl-apps.title: Irish players — PL Appearances
irish-pl-apps.hint: Given (451), O'Shea (446) and Dunne (432) all bust — Whelan (40), Quinn (43) for the finish.
